last_action: Implemented Move-out Settlement system with pro-rated rent, utility checks, and deposit management.
summary: Phase 10: Bug Fixing and UX Translation. Significant architectural enhancement with the Move-out Settlement system. This feature automates pro-rated rent calculation for mid-month move-outs, enforces mandatory final meter reading checks, and provides a structured interface for managing security deposit deductions (cleaning, damages, unpaid bills). Added the Settlement database model and a guided UI modal to ensure financial accuracy and transparency during tenant departures. Also addressed dashboard parsing errors and improved LINE multi-room logic.
next_steps: Monitor LINE webhook logs for any issues with the new PostbackEvent handler.
Verify the 'openKeyboard' behavior on actual mobile devices (iOS/Android).
Prepare for Phase 11: Final user acceptance testing and documentation updates.
